system_recommendation.executive_summary: Hormuz closure entering second week — this is now the most severe chokepoint disruption since 1990-91. Brent above $80. Import-dependent economies must activate emergency sourcing: maximum Gulf term nominations, accelerated LNG diversion, and diplomatic outreach to Saudi Arabia and UAE for priority loading.

actual_outcome.documented_response: India announced diplomatic engagement with Saudi Arabia and UAE for priority crude access. IOC and BPCL issued tenders for alternate crude grades. Indian Navy established escort protocol for Indian-flagged tankers.
